description: Characters who work as guides, messengers, and general laborers.
characters: A knowledgeable local who knows every trail and shortcut.
A swift runner who carries news between distant places.
A salt-crusted seafarer who reads wind and wave by instinct.
A fearless wanderer who seeks what lies beyond the map's edge.
A star-reading wayfinder who always knows the heading.
A dust-covered digger who works deep beneath the earth.
A decisive leader who commands ship or company with steady hand.
A watchful sentinel standing between danger and those they protect.
A quiet boatman who carries travelers across deep water.
